title: Ocean Resin Coaster Set - Handmade Beach Home Decor with Natural Seashells & Sand | Coastal Gift
metaTitle: Ocean Resin Coaster Set | Handmade Beach Decor & Coastal Gift
metaDescription: Bring the beach home with our Ocean Resin Coaster Set. Handcrafted with epoxy resin, seashells & sand. Perfect coastal gift. Custom colors available. Shop now!
shortDescription: Handmade resin coasters with real seashells & sand. Set of 4, 4x4 inches. Custom colors available. Perfect beach decor gift.
fullDescription:
Immerse your home in the serene beauty of the ocean with our Ocean Resin Coaster Set. Each coaster is a miniature work of art, handcrafted with premium epoxy resin, natural seashells, and genuine sand to capture the essence of the shoreline. The set includes four 4x4 inch coasters, each uniquely designed to bring a touch of coastal tranquility to your space.

**Emotional Hook:** Imagine sipping your morning coffee while gazing at the gentle waves and sunlit sands—now you can, every day. These coasters aren't just functional; they're a reminder of your favorite beach memories, a piece of paradise for your table.

**Customization:** Want to match your decor? We offer color customization! Simply message us your preferred resin color (e.g., turquoise, seafoam, or sunset orange), and we'll create a set that's uniquely yours. Production takes 5-7 days, ensuring every detail is perfect.

**Specifications & Use:** Each coaster is 4x4 inches, ideal for mugs, glasses, or small plants. The smooth resin surface is water-resistant and easy to clean—just wipe with a damp cloth. Durable and non-slip, they protect your furniture while adding a beachy vibe to your living room, office, or patio.

**Perfect Gift:** Searching for a coastal gift? This set is a thoughtful present for ocean lovers, newlyweds, or anyone who dreams of the sea. Packaged in a gift-ready box, it's ready to delight.

Bring the ocean home today—order your Ocean Resin Coaster Set and let every sip feel like a seaside escape.
